name: Stremio
description: A flixclusive adapter for Stremio addons. Torrent addons, such as Torrentio, don't work without debrid accounts.

name: TMDB
description:
A provider for The Movie Database (TMDB), offering catalog browsing, content
discovery, metadata, search, and watch-provider links.

Fixes:
- [x] Resolve null TMDB API key issue

name: Trakt
description: A provider acting as an adapter for the Trakt API, providing metadata, tracking and discovery features.
